🔗 Similar LC Problems

Visualize how LeetCode problems relate by topic, pattern, and difficulty — built for Google SWE interview prep

10 Hover nodes/links to explore • click a tag to see problems
Flow: Difficulty level → Topic tag → relative problem count
Click nodes to expand/collapse • scroll to zoom
Root → Difficulty → Topic → Problems (click topics to expand)
Bubble size = count of problems in that group
Each bubble = one topic tag. Hover for details.
Drag nodes • scroll to zoom • edges = shared tags
Problems are connected when they share 2+ topic tags. Thicker edges = more shared tags.
